name: adding a principle to the catalog promotes a g-universal rule with no code change
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_universal rubric/detectors standards
printf '%s' '{"principles":[{"id":"g-universal-zzz-test","name":"t","description":"d","source":"owasp-asvs","section":"x","severity":"P2","mode":"forbid","classification":"universal","patterns":["ZZZSECRET"]}]}' > standards/universal-standards-catalog.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-universal-rules.sh --root . >/dev/null 2>&1
grep -q 'id: g-universal-zzz-test' generated-code-quality-standards/_universal/universal-standards.yaml && echo catalog-driven 1>&2
